__fallback__.headline: Offline pepper guidance
__fallback__.next_step: Retake a clear pepper leaf photo and confirm in the field before applying chemical treatment.
__fallback__.ppe: Gloves, mask or respirator as per label, eye protection, long sleeves
actions: Retake a close pepper leaf photo in even light if symptoms are unclear.
Separate heavily affected foliage if it can be done safely.
Avoid broad spraying based only on the offline result.
monitoring: Check the same plants again within 24 to 48 hours.
Inspect nearby pepper plants for similar spots.
prevention: Clean tools before moving between rows.
Reduce splash spread and long periods of wet leaves.
escalate_if: Symptoms spread rapidly across several plants.
Fruit lesions or severe defoliation become visible.
notes: This is crop-specific offline guidance and still needs field confirmation.
__fallback__.verification_note: Draft treatment guidance. Expert agronomy review is required before pesticide use.

Pepper__bell___healthy.headline: Leaf appears healthy
Pepper__bell___healthy.next_step: No disease class was flagged. Continue routine scouting and rescan only if symptoms appear.
actions: Rescan only if new spots or yellowing begin to spread.
monitoring: Inspect young and middle leaves during the next field round.
Watch after rain or overhead irrigation for new lesions.
prevention: Keep tools clean and remove badly damaged leaves promptly.
Maintain balanced irrigation and nutrition to reduce plant stress.
escalate_if: New spots spread across several leaves.
Nearby plants begin to show similar symptoms.
notes: Healthy predictions can still miss early field symptoms. Keep scouting.
Pepper__bell___healthy.verification_note: No pesticide treatment is recommended for a healthy result.

Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.headline: Likely bacterial spot
Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.next_step: Confirm in the field quickly. Prioritize sanitation and avoid overhead irrigation while you verify treatment options.
Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.active_ingredient: Fixed copper bactericide; copper plus mancozeb where locally registered for pepper bacterial spot.
Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.dosage: Use the locally registered label rate for the selected pepper bacterial spot product.
Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.ppe: Gloves and protective clothing; eye protection if spraying.
Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.pre_harvest_interval: Follow the locally registered product label PHI for pepper.
Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.re_entry_interval: Follow the locally registered product label REI.
actions: Remove badly infected leaves where practical.
Avoid working wet plants to reduce spread.
monitoring: Track whether new spots are appearing on young leaves.
Watch fruit surfaces for expanding lesions.
prevention: Reduce splash spread from irrigation or runoff.
Avoid moving from infected rows to clean rows without sanitation.
escalate_if: Symptoms spread quickly after rainfall or irrigation.
notes: Confirm in the field before choosing bactericide options.
Advisory treatment options only. Confirm the locally registered product label for dosage, PHI, and REI before spraying.
Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.verification_note: Advisory treatment options only. Confirm the locally registered product label for dosage, PHI, and REI before spraying.
